title: Run Gemma on the edge with the Coral Board
summary: Google's Coral Board is a low-power edge AI development board featuring the Coral NPU accelerator, designed to run Gemma models on-device. The kit includes peripherals such as a screen, camera, microphones, and LEDs, with open-source demos showcasing live translation, natural language control, and multimodal AI inference entirely on the board.
writeup: This video introduces Google's Coral Board, a low-power edge AI development board built around the Coral NPU accelerator and designed to run Gemma models on-device. The kit ships with a screen, camera, microphones, and LEDs, and the demos run entirely on the board rather than in the cloud. The open-source demos cover live translation, natural language control, and multimodal AI inference, showing how Gemma can operate locally on dedicated edge hardware.
